+$180,000 in profit over the last 30 days trading 5-minute markets on Polymarket.

Most see a casino. He sees edge.

His wallet: https://t.co/rnST665Q2N

Average profit: +$6,000/day.
Past week: +$52,000.
All-time PnL: +$319,000.

65,000+ predictions placed and the equity curve is still making new highs.

The strategy combines two very different approaches:
> buys 99¢ outcomes with $500-20,000 positions when conviction is high
> occasionally buys 1-2¢ outcomes with $10-200 positions - this is where the biggest returns come from

Best examples:
$149 -> $13,450 (+8,904%)
$88 -> $8,434 (+9,378%)
$68 -> $6,876 (+9,900%)
$204 -> $8,905 (+4,254%)

No hedged trades.

Just pure directional conviction.

Two opposite risk profiles.

One result: +$319,000 PnL.

Traded delta-neutral all week on @variational_io + @OndoPerps.

Results:
> volume: $150k
> fees + slippage: -$71
> Ondo rewards: +$51
> net: -$20

Variational points arrive on Friday.

Ondo points should be distributed retroactively once the points system goes live.

We've seen this playbook before with Variational.

Now I'm switching to funding farming.

The goal: reduce costs while continuing to farm points.

Current setup:
> limit orders only
> trade only XAU and XAG
> hold positions for 6-24 hours
> monitor funding and reopen positions when rates change

Variational + Ondo in DN mode = farming two potential airdrops at once.

https://t.co/TvLzJyHxmu

We've already seen this playbook with @nadoHQ.

> 500+ ETH in trading volume

RT @Polymarket: Questions are everything. 

Because the people who never stop asking are the ones who find answers. https://t.co/MZteQLEfqQ

Jeff Bezos spent years selling over $1 billion of Amazon stock every year to fund Blue Origin.

He's already invested tens of billions of dollars of his own money into space.

"We're not going to space for the sake of space.

We want to move polluting industry off Earth and return this planet to its pre-industrial state."

After a recent setback, Blue Origin is rebuilding and plans to fly again this year. They're building lunar landers, orbital data centers, and AI tools for engineers.

"The Moon is a gift. We're going there to stay."

The man who built Amazon is now trying to build the space economy.

Bookmark & watch the full conversation ↓

Odds on @Polymarket imply just a 39% chance of Variational reaching an $800M FDV the day after TGE.

Variational has raised 15x more capital, has 3.5x more users, and already reached $1B OI before launching its token.

Looks like one of the clearest mispricings.

This bot made +$60,000 in one month trading 5-minute markets on Polymarket!

Account: https://t.co/VE7mju7ptz

+$27,000 over the last week.

+$2,000/day!

Best trades:
$1,913 -> $4,380
$1,552 -> $3,465
$1,833 -> $3,738

The bot uses two strategies.

1. Asymmetric spread trading:
> buys both outcomes (Up + Down)
> larger size on the outcome favored by the model
> small profit if correct
> small loss if wrong
> edge appears across thousands of trades

2. Fast scalping:
> buys $500-1,000 right after market open
> sells after a 1-3% move
> typically captures $5-30 per trade

Both strategies require high volume and come with significant fee costs.

So far the bot has paid over $40,000 in taker fees.

At the same time, it has earned +$25,000 in maker rebates.

Current net profit: +$45,000.

An important reminder: PnL without fees means very little.

Many bots show a profitable PnL chart but end up losing money after fees.

Modern trading bots must account for commissions, slippage, and execution quality - not just strategy performance.

This bot does exactly that.

Many people call @variational_io "just another Perp DEX"

That's like calling Binance "just another crypto exchange" in 2018.

The team came from Genesis Trading, one of crypto's largest OTC businesses.

They've also hired talent from Jane Street, Goldman Sachs, Meta, and Google.

Most Perp DEXs are building an exchange.

Variational is building trading infrastructure.

That's why it already has 3 products:
> Omni - for retail traders
> Pro - for OTC and institutional trading
> OLP - an in-house market maker and liquidity engine

This isn't just another order book.

It's a full on-chain brokerage platform.

The protocol already generates millions in revenue.

And it's growing rapidly through RWAs.

Recently, @tiger_research_ estimated Variational's TGE FDV at $1.05B

At that valuation with 25% community allocation, points would be worth ~$28 each.

This is their conservative scenario (with a 28% market discount baked in).

If crypto recovers by TGE, $1.5B -> $2B -> $3B FDV looks very achievable.

Only ~3 months left in the points program.

Farming costs are currently $5-8 per point, while competition continues to drop.

Now is one of the best times to farm.
